chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ الْحُرِّ يَقْتُلُ مَمْلُوكَ غَيْرِهِ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الْمَمْلُوكِ يَقْتُلُ الْحُرَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – The free man kills a slave of someone else, or injures him, and the slave kills the free or injures him

text: قَالَ يَلْزَمُ مَوْلَى الْعَبْدِ قِصَاصُ جِرَاحَةِ عَبْدِهِ مِنْ قِيمَةِ دِيَتِهِ عَلَى حِسَابِ ذَلِكَ يَصِيرُ أَرْشَ الْجِرَاحَةِ وَ إِذَا جَرَحَ الْحُرُّ الْعَبْدَ فَقِيمَةُ جِرَاحَتِهِ مِنْ حِسَابِ قِيمَتِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from the one who reported it, said,

‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It necessitates a master of the slave (to accept) the retaliation of an injury of his slave from the value of his wergild upon the accounting which comes to compensate for the injury; and when the free injures the slave, the value of his injury is from accounting of his (own) value’.
